ModuleTitle.helper: Used by OpenContent and DNN module settings. This is not displayed to site visitors.

ModuleAnchor.helper: Optional. Used to create #anchor-links on the page. Use only letters, numbers, and hyphens.

SectionHeading.helper: Required. Main heading for the left column. HTML is allowed and will render in the view.
SectionHeading.placeholder: The Nervous System's Return to Center

IntroText.helper: Required. Introductory content for the right column. Basic formatting and links are fine. HTML is allowed and will render in the view.
